name: Andretti Acquisition Corp. II
business: Andretti Acquisition Corp. II is a blank check company formed to effect a business combination with one or more businesses. It has no operating revenues and has not yet completed a business combination. The company is seeking a target in any industry, with a focus on well-established companies with competitive positions and growth potential.

catalysts.event: Termination of StoreDot Business Combination Agreement
catalysts.sentence: On February 17, 2026, we, StoreDot, Pubco, SPAC Merger Sub and Company Merger Sub entered into a Termination and Release Agreement (the StoreDot Termination Agreement ) pursuant to which the parties mutually agreed to terminate the StoreDot BCA in its entirety pursuant to Section 8.1(a) thereof.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination (Combination Period end)
catalysts.sentence: We must complete our initial Business Combination by (x) September 9, 2026, the end of our Combination Period, which is 24-months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering, (y) such earlier liquidation date as our Board may approve or (z) such later date as our shareholders may approve pursuant to the Amended and Restated Articles.
